air.name: Air
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You can manipulate lightning, mist, and wind, traffic with air creatures, and are resistant to electricity damage.

::ab[Lightning Arc (Sp)]{id=arc icon=zap standard="Target any foe within 30 ft. with a ranged touch attack, dealing 1d6 electricity damage + 1 point for every two cleric levels you possess." useMod3=Wis}
::ab[Electricity Resistance (Ex)]{id=res icon=def l6="Gain ‹umr/resist› electricity 10" l12="Resistance increases to 20" l20="‹umr/Immune› to electricity"}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="obscuring mist~wind wall~gaseous form~air walk~control winds~chain lightning~elemental body IV|air only~whirlwind~elemental swarm|air spell only" save=domain}

::ab[Thundercloud (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹electricity resistance/#res›› power of the Air domain" l=8 icon=magic standard="Summon a storm cloud. This power functions as ‹spell/fog cloud› except that creatures inside the cloud are ‹misc/deafened› and take 2d6 points of electricity damage each round from the flashes of thunder and lightning. Once created, you can concentrate on the cloud to move it up to 30 feet each round." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="solid fog" l9="storm of vengeance"}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Lightning Rod (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹electricity resistance/#res›› power of the Air domain" l=8 icon=magic swift="When you cast a spell with the electricity descriptor, you can designate one creature within line of sight. The spell's damage against that creature increases by 50%, as if affected by the ‹feat/Empower Spell› feat. This additional damage results from divine power that is not subject to being reduced by electricity resistance, and you take an equal amount of electricity damage immediately after you cast the spell. The spell can deal this additional damage only once, even if it could affect the target multiple times." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="shocking grasp" l2="flame blade|deals electricity damage and gains the electricity descriptor instead of fire" l3="lightning bolt"}

::ab[Wind Blast (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹lightning arc/#arc›› power of the Air domain" l=8 icon=line standard="Unleash a blast of air in a 30-foot line. Make a combat maneuver check against each creature in the line, using your caster level as your base attack bonus and your Wisdom modifier in place of your Strength modifier. Treat the results as a ‹rule/bull rush› attempt." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="whispering wind" l6="wind walk" l9="winds of vengeance"}

animal.name: Animal
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You can speak with and befriend animals with ease.
::ab[Class Skill (Ex)]{passive="You treat Knowledge (nature) as a class skill." icon=power}
::ab[Speak with Animals (Sp)]{id=speak icon=magic standard="You can ‹spell/speak with animals›, as per the spell." useL3=cleric useNC}

::ab[Animal Companion (Ex)]{l=4 icon=power passive="You gain the service of an ‹sidekick/animal companion›. Your effective druid level for this animal companion is equal to your cleric level - 3. (Druids who take this ability through their nature bond class feature use their druid level - 3 to determine the abilities of their animal companions)."}

::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="calm animals~hold animal~dominate animal~summon nature's ally IV|animals only~beast shape III|animals only~antilife shell~animal shapes~summon nature's ally VIII|animals only~shapechange" save=domain}
@HL[Replacement Power:] Add Fly to your list of class skills. In addition, whenever you cast a spell that grants you a fly speed, your maneuverability increases by one step (up to perfect).

::ab[Eyes of the Hawk (Ex)]{replace="The ‹‹speak with animals/#speak›› power of the Animal domain" icon=boost passive="You gain a racial bonus on Perception checks equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1). In addition, if you can act during a surprise round, you receive a +2 racial bonus on your Initiative check."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="feather fall" l3=fly l6="mass fly"}

::ab[Predator's Grace (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹speak with animals/#speak›› power of the Animal domain" icon=boost swift="Grant yourself a +10-foot bonus to your base speed for 1 round. This bonus increases by 5 feet for every 5 cleric levels you possess. In addition, you gain low-light vision for 1 round. If you already possess low-light vision, the range of your sight becomes three times that of a human in dim light for 1 round." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="magic fang" l3="beast shape I|animals only"}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

@HL[Replacement Power:] The domain spells provided by the Insect domain affect vermin rather than animals, treating them as if they were not immune to spells with the mind-affecting descriptor. Any such spell that allows a Will save can instead be negated by the target vermin with a successful Fortitude save at the same DC.

::ab[Exoskeleton (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹speak with animals/#speak›› power of the Animal domain" icon=def swift="Grow an exoskeleton that grants you a +1 enhancement bonus to your natural armor and 1d4 ‹rule/temporary hit points› + 1 for every 2 cleric levels you have. The natural armor bonus increases by 1 for every 5 cleric levels you have. The exoskeleton retracts after 1 round, ending its benefits." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="giant vermin" l5="vermin shape II" l8="summon nature's ally VIII|1d3 goliath stag beetles"}

artifice.name: Artifice
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You can repair damage to objects, animate objects with life, and create objects from nothing.

::ab[Artificer's Touch (Sp)]{id=touch icon=touch standard="You can cast ‹spell/mending› at will, using your cleric level as the caster level to repair damaged objects. In addition, you can cause damage to objects and construct creatures by striking them with a melee touch attack. Objects and constructs take 1d6 points of damage +1 for every two cleric levels you possess. This attack bypasses an amount of damage reduction and hardness equal to your cleric level." useMod3=Wis}
::ab[Dancing Weapons (Su)]{l=8 id=dance icon=boost standard="You can give a weapon touched the ‹magic-enh/dancing› special weapon quality for 4 rounds." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
Alternately, you can choose to learn an ‹ability/annointing<s› instead of gaining the dancing weapons ability at 8th level.
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="animate rope~wood shape~stone shape~minor creation~fabricate~major creation~wall of iron~instant summons~prismatic sphere" save=domain}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Divine Alchemy (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹artificer's touch/#touch›› power of the Artifice domain" icon=magic ability="You can perform a 1-minute ritual that infuses a flask of water with one of your prepared spells, creating an improvised potion that lasts until consumed or the next time you prepare spells. You can use this ability only with spells that target one or more creatures, and the maximum spell level you can infuse in this way is equal to 1 + 1 for every 4 cleric levels you have. These potions are treated as ‹class/alchemist› extracts for the purpose of your domain spells." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="touch injection" l4="amplify elixir" l6="delayed consumption"}

::ab[Animate Servant (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹dancing weapon/#dance›› power of the Artifice domain" l=8 icon=magic standard="You can give life to inanimate objects. This ability functions as ‹spell/animate objects› using your cleric level as the caster level." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l7="limited wish" l8="polymorph any object"}

::ab[Aura of Efficiency (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹dancing weapon/#dance›› power of the Artifice domain" l=8 icon=protect standard="You can emit a 30-foot-radius aura that grants your allies a +4 bonus on all saving throws against effects that inflict the ‹misc/fatigued› or ‹misc/exhausted› condition. Any equipment wielded by your allies within this area gets a bonus to hardness equal to 1/2 your cleric level, and your allies' attacks against targets within this area ignore an equal amount of hardness." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="crafter's fortune" l7="mage's magnificent mansion" l9="wooden phalanx"}

::ab[Aura of Repetition (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹dancing weapon/#dance›› power of the Artifice domain" l=8 icon=aura standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of repetition. All enemies within this aura must make a Will save each round or repeat their action from the previous round (if possible). Creatures that attacked on the previous round attack again on the following round, although they may change their target. Creatures that moved the previous round must take the same move action again, although they may change their route. Creatures that drank a potion must do so again, even they can only drink from an empty bottle. Actions that cannot be repeated are wasted." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=command l5="waves of fatigue" l7="waves of exhaustion"}
@HL[Replacement Power:] Note: Only creatures with the ‹trait/Kobold Faith› trait can take this subdomain.

::ab[Supernatural Trap (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹dancing weapons/#dance›› power of the Artifice domain" l=8 icon=power ability="When you gain this ability, select a supernatural ‹ability/ranger trap<s›. You are now able make this trap. The DCs for Perception checks, Disable Device checks, and saving throws against the trap are equal to 10 + 1/2 your character level + your Wisdom bonus. The trap lasts for 1 hour or until triggered." useMod=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=snare l3="improve trap" l7="teleport trap"}

chaos.name: Chaos
description: ::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Abhoth~Abraxas~Acavna~Aldinach~Andirifkhu~Angazhan~Apep~Areshkagal~Ashava~Ashukharma~Azathoth~Baphomet~Bastet~Bergelmir~Besmara~Black Butterfly~Bokrug~Calistria~Camazotz~Cayden Cailean~Cernunnos~Chadali~Chaugnar Faugn~Chavazvug~Chucaro~Count Ranalc~Cthulhu~Cyth-V'sug~Daclau-Sar~Dagon~Dahak~Deskari~Desna~Dretha~Elion~Findeladlara~Flauros~Ghlaunder~Gogunta~Gorum~Groetus~Guyuku~Gyronna~Haagenti~Haggakal~Hanspur~Hastur~Hathor~Hei Feng~Hembad~Il'surrish~Immonhiel~Isph-Aun-Vuln~Ithaqua~Izyagna~Jalaijatali~Jezelda~Jubilex~Kabriri~Keltheald~Ketephys~Kitumu~Kofusachi~Kostchtchie~Kro'akoth~Lady Nanbyo~Lalaci~Lamashtu~Lanishra~Marishi~Mazmezz~Menxyr~Mestama~Mhar~Milani~Mordiggian~Murnath~Narriseminek~Nephthys~Nhimbaloth~Nightripper~Nocticula~Nocticula (Redeemed)~Nulgreth~Nurgal~Nyarlathotep (Black Pharaoh)~Nyarlathotep (Faceless Sphinx)~Nyarlathotep (Haunter of the Dark)~Oaur-Ooung~Ongalte~Onmyuza~Orcus~Orgesh~Ovonovo~Pazuzu~Picoperi~Pulura~Ragadahn~Reymenda~Rhan-Tegoth~Rovagug~Rull~Sekhmet~Selket~Sezelrian~Shamira~Shax~Shiggarreb~Shivaska~Shub-Niggurath~Sifkesh~Sinashakti~Sithhud~Skode~Skrymir~Sobek~Socothbenoth~Speakers of the Depths~Ssila'meshnik~Sun Wukong~Thamir Gixx~The Lantern King~Thisamet~Thremyr~Thuskchoon~Tjasse~Tolc~Treerazer~Tsathoggua~Urazra~Urxehl~Ushitora~Valani~Varg~Verex~Xoveron~Yamasoth~Ydajisk~Ydersius~Yhidothrus~Yig~Yog-Sothoth~Zagresh~Zevgavizeb~Zogmugot~Zura"}
@HL[Granted Powers:] Your touch infuses life and weapons with chaos, and you revel in all things anarchic.

::ab[Touch of Chaos (Sp)]{id=touch icon=touch-roll standard="You can imbue a target with chaos as a melee touch attack. For the next round, anytime the target rolls a d20, he must roll twice and take the less favorable result." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Chaos Blade (Su)]{id=blade l=8 icon=boost standard="You can give a weapon touched the ‹magic-enh/anarchic› special weapon quality for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level." useInc="4~cleric~8"}

::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="protection from law~align weapon|chaos only~magic circle against law~chaos hammer~dispel law~animate objects~word of chaos~cloak of chaos~summon monster IX|chaos spell only" save=domain}
‹family/Azata«s› are a race of chaotic good outsiders.

::ab[Elysium's Call (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of chaos/#touch›› power of the Chaos domain" icon=aid standard="With a touch, you can imbue creatures with the spirit of Elysium, lifting their spirits and freeing them from bonds. The creatures touched can immediately reroll any failed saving throws against spells and spell-like abilities of the enchantment (charm) and enchantment (compulsion) subschools. In addition, targets receive a +2 sacred bonus on such saving throws and a +2 sacred bonus on CMB checks to escape a grapple. Finally, targets can ignore up to 5 feet of ‹rule/difficult terrain› each round, as if they had the ‹feat/Nimble Moves› feat. These bonuses last for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1), although the saving throw reroll only applies when the creature is touched." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="expeditious retreat" l3=fly l6="planar ally|azata only"}

::ab[Faith-Stealing Strike (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of chaos/#touch›› ability of the Chaos domain" icon=melee standard="You can make a single melee attack using your highest base attack bonus against a creature capable of casting divine spells. If you damage the creature, it must succeed at a Will save (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier) or be unable to cast any divine spells for 1 round. If you do not damage your target with the attack, this ability is expended with no effect." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="align weapon|chaos or evil only" l6="corrosive consumption"}
‹family/Demon«s› are a race of chaotic evil outsiders.

::ab[Fury of the Abyss (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of chaos/#touch›› power of the Chaos domain" icon=boost swift="As a swift action, you can give yourself an enhancement bonus equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1) on melee attacks, melee damage rolls, and combat maneuver checks. This bonus lasts for 1 round. During this round, you take a -2 penalty to AC." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=doom l3=rage l6="planar binding|demons only"}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/180;Inner Sea Gods/224;Blood of Fiends/15›

::ab[Hasten the End (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹chaos blade/#blade›› power of the Chaos domain" l=8 icon=melee immediate="Upon successfully hitting an opponent with a melee attack, you may reduce the remaining duration of all beneficial magical effects currently affecting the target by 1 round, minute, hour, or day - whichever measurement is used to determine the duration of each particular magical effect." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="entropic shield" l3="dispel magic" l5=confusion l7=destruction}
::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Bastet~Besmara~Gorum~Hei Feng~Nephthys~Rovagug~Sekhmet~Sivanah~Sobek~Speakers of the Depths~Sun Wukong"}
‹family/Protean«s› are a race of chaotic neutral outsiders.

::ab[Aura of Chaos (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹chaos blade/#blade›› power of the Chaos domain" l=8 icon=aura standard="You can surround yourself with a field of wild energies. Thee energies manifest as a 30-foot aura of chaos for a number of rounds per day equal to your cleric level. All enemies within this aura must declare one type of action at the start of their turn (attack, cast a spell, move, use an item, or activate a special ability) and make a Will save. Creatures that fail the Will save must take an action other than their declared action. If they succeed, they must take the declared action. Creatures cannot select actions that they cannot perform."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="lesser confusion" l3=displacement l6="planar binding|proteans only"}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/181;Champions of Purity/21;Inner Sea Gods/226›

::ab[Intense Celebration (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹chaos blade/#blade›› ability of the Chaos domain" l=8 icon=magic passive="Spells you cast that confer a morale effect upon you or your allies are automatically affected as if by the ‹feat/Extend Spell› metamagic feat, but with no increase in spell level."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="hideous laughter" l3="good hope" l6="heroes' feast" l8="irresistible dance"}

::ab[Aura of Bedlam (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹chaos blade/#blade›› power of the Chaos domain" l=8 icon=lower standard="You can emit a 30-foot-radius aura of chaos and strife. Enemies in the aura take a penalty on ‹rule/concentration› checks and are treated as experiencing vigorous motion (concentration DC = 10 + spell level) when attempting to cast spells. The penalty is equal to ‹misc/one-half› of your cleric level. This is a mind-affecting effect." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4=confusion l7="song of discord" l9="symbol of strife"}

::ab[Unexpected Whimsy (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹chaos blade/#blade›› of the Chaos domain" l=8 icon=aura standard="You dance, act like a buffoon, or commit some other act of whimsy. When you do, enemies within 30 feet of you that can see and hear you must succeed a Will saving throw (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + half your Wisdom modifier) or they collapse into gales of manic laughter, falling prone. Those who fail their saving throws can take no actions other than laughing for 1 round, but are not considered ‹misc/helpless›." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="hideous laughter" l4=confusion l6="cloak of dreams"}

A cleric (or any other character capable of selecting a domain) who worships the deity in question can choose to gain the variant domain power upon first gaining the domain in question, but the choice to replace the domain power must be made immediately upon gaining access to that domain and cannot be changed thereafter.

‹faith/Cayden Cailean› stands opposed to any force that denies free will. Servants of Cayden make unique exorcists, as their methods radically differ from those of other churches, despite often using similar spells and items. Spirited consumption of alcohol usually precedes any formal activity, and while it may seem to onlookers that Caydenites are feckless drunks, the devoted use this time to elicit truthful statements about the possessed from those with whom they drink. In this way, the servants of Cayden ensure they have all the proper information before moving against a supernatural threat, which they undoubtedly do with a (mostly) sober head.

::ab[Drunken Autonomy (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of chaos/#touch›› domain power of the Chaos domain" icon=def swift="Whenever under the effects of mind-affecting magic, possession, or similar external control, you can channel the unrestricted nature of your god. Instead of acting under the compulsion, you instead act as though you had the ‹misc/confused› condition for 1 round. Producing the &quot&act normally&quot& result allows you to act free of mental compulsion for that round." useMod3=Wis}

charm.name: Charm
description: ::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Ardad Lili~Arshea~Bastet~Belial~Bolka~Calistria~Cayden Cailean~Dachzerul~Droskar~Eritrice~Folca~Grandmother Spider~Hathor~Hembad~Isis~Kofusachi~Laivatiniel~Mestama~Mrtyu~Naderi~Nalinivati~Nephthys~Nocticula~Norgorber~Onamahli~Onmyuza~Picoperi~Scarmiglione~Seramaydiel~Shamira~Shelyn~Shelyn (pre-Earthfall)~Socothbenoth~The Green Mother~The Lantern King~Ulon~Upion and Warrik~Velgaas~Verex~Vermilion Mother~Xsistaid~Zaigasnar~Zepar"}
@HL[Granted Powers:] You can baffle and befuddle foes with a touch or a smile, and your beauty and grace are divine.

::ab[Dazing Touch (Sp)]{id=touch icon=touch standard="You can cause a living creature to become ‹misc/dazed› for 1 round as a melee touch attack. Creatures with more Hit Dice than your cleric level are unaffected." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Charming Smile (Sp)]{id=smile l=8 icon=zap swift="You can cast *charm person* with a DC of 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier. You can only have one creature charmed in this way at a time." usage="The total number of rounds of this effect per day is equal to your cleric level. The rounds do not need to be consecutive, and you can dismiss the charm at any time as a free action. Each attempt to use this ability consumes 1 round of its duration, whether or not the creature succeeds on its save to resist the effect."}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Entrancing Aura (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹charming smile/#smile›› power of the Charm domain" icon=lower standard="You can emit an imperceptible 30-foot aura of distraction. ::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=hypnotism l2="hypnotic pattern" l4="rainbow pattern"}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Ardad Lili~Arshea~Bolka~Cayden Cailean~Hathor~Hembad~Isis~Kofusachi~Laivatiniel~Naderi~Nalinivati~Shamira~Shelyn~Shelyn (pre-Earthfall)~Socothbenoth~The Lantern King~Upion and Warrik"}

::ab[Adoration (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹dazing touch/#touch›› power of the Charm domain" icon=def immediate="You can attempt to thwart a melee or ranged attack that targets you. This ability functions as ‹spell/sanctuary›, but only against one individual attack. You must use the ability after the attack is declared but before the roll is made. The creature attacking you receives a Will save to negate this effect. If a creature has more than one attack, this ability only affects one of the attacks. This is a mind-affecting effect." useMod3=Wis}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Ardad Lili~Arshea~Bastet~Belial~Bolka~Calistria~Cayden Cailean~Folca~Kofusachi~Lymnieris~Menxyr~Mestama~Naderi~Nalinivati~Nephthys~Nocticula~Onamahli~Onmyuza~Scarmiglione~Shamira~Slandrais~Socothbenoth~The Green Mother~The Lantern King~Ulon~Verex~Vermilion Mother~Zaigasnar~Zepar"}

::ab[Anything to Please (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹charming smile/#smile›› power of the Charm domain" l=8 icon=zap standard="You can compel a creature within 30 feet to attempt to please you. The creature receives a Will save to negate this affect. If the save fails, the creature attacks your enemies for 1 round, gives you its most valuable item, or drops ‹rule/prone› at your feet and grovels for 1d4 rounds (GM's choice). This is a mind-affecting effect." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="touch of idiocy" l4=confusion}

community.name: Community
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] Your touch can heal wounds, and your presence instills unity and strengthens emotional bonds.

::ab[Calming Touch (Sp)]{id=touch icon=aid standard="You can touch a creature as a standard action to heal it of 1d6 points of nonlethal damage + 1 point per cleric level. This touch also removes the ‹misc/fatigued›, ‹misc/shaken›, and ‹misc/sickened› conditions (but has no effect on more severe conditions)." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Unity (Su)]{id=unity l=8 icon=protect immediate="Whenever a spell or effect targets you and one or more allies within 30 feet, you can use this ability to allow your allies to use your saving throw against the effect in place of their own. Each ally must decide individually before the rolls are made." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="bless~shield other~prayer~imbue with spell ability~telepathic bond~heroes' feast~refuge~mass cure critical wounds~miracle" save=domain}

::ab[Synergistic Touch (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹calming touch/#touch›› ability of the Community domain" icon=touch standard="You can touch a creature to confer upon it the benefits of any one teamwork feat that you possess. This effect persists for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1)." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="borrow skill" l2="share language" l3="coordinated effort"}

::ab[Teaching Moment (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹unity/#unity›› power of the Community domain" l=8 icon=aid-roll immediate="When you or an ally within 30 feet rolls a natural 1 or a natural 20 on an attack roll, an ability check, a skill check, or a saving throw, you can grant all allies within 30 feet special insights that help them overcome similar challenges. Once during the next minute, each affected creature can choose to roll twice and take the better result before attempting an attack roll, ability check, skill check, or saving throw." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="know the enemy" l2="fox's cunning" l6="battlemind link" l8="circle of clarity"}

::ab[Binding Ties (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹calming touch/#touch›› power of the Community domain" icon=aid standard="As a standard action, you can touch an ally and remove one condition affecting the ally by transferring it to yourself. This transfer lasts a number of rounds equal to your cleric level, but you can end it as a free action on your turn. At the end of this effect, the condition reverts to the original creature, unless it has ended or is removed by another effect. While this power is in use, the target is immune to the transferred condition." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="calm emotions" l3="create food and water"}

::ab[Guarded Hearth (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹unity/#unity›› power of the Community domain" l=8 icon=protect ability="You can create a ward that protects a specified area. Creating this ward takes 10 minutes of uninterrupted work. This ward has a maximum radius of 5 feet per 2 cleric levels you possess. When the ward is completed, you designate any number of creatures inside its area. Should any other creature enter the warded area, all of the selected creatures are immediately alerted (and awoken if they were asleep). The designated creatures also receive a sacred bonus equal to your Wisdom modifier on all saving throws and attack rolls while inside the warded area. This ward immediately ends if you leave the area. The ward lasts for 1 hour per cleric level." usage="Once a day"}

A cleric (or any other character capable of selecting a domain) who worships the deity in question can choose to gain the variant domain power upon first gaining the domain in question, but the choice to replace the domain power must be made immediately upon gaining access to that domain and cannot be changed thereafter.

A risen spirit is akin to a plant that must be tended. Such are the teachings of ‹faith/Urgathoa›, the goddess who is believed to be the first undead creature. Unlike many of her deific counterparts, Urgathoa champions the shepherding and protection of haunts and possessing spirits, even to the danger and detriment of her own followers. The faithful of the Pallid Princess believe that by prolonging the torment and tortured existence of a spirit, they create something akin to a beautiful piece of artwork. In a similar manner, servants of Urgathoa view the possession of a mortal body by a deceased spirit as a blessing.

::ab[Necrotic Tending (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹bleeding touch/#touch›› domain power of the Death domain" icon=aid standard="You can touch an undead creature or area affected by a haunt, restoring 1d8 hit points + 1 for every 2 cleric levels you have. This ability has no effect on other creatures." useMod3=Wis}

description: These subdomains are associated with both the ‹domain/Law› and ‹domain/Evil› domains.

fire.name: Fire
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You can call forth fire, command creatures of the inferno, and your flesh does not burn.

::ab[Fire Bolt (Sp)]{id=bolt icon=zap standard="You can unleash a scorching bolt of divine fire from your outstretched hand. You can target any single foe within 30 feet as a ranged touch attack with this bolt of fire. If you hit the foe, the fire bolt deals 1d6 points of fire damage + 1 point for every two cleric levels you possess." useMod3=Wis}
::ab[Fire Resistance (Ex)]{id=res l=6 icon=def l6="You gain ‹umr/resist› fire 10." l12="Your resistance increases to 20." l20="You gain ‹umr/immunity› to fire."}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="burning hands~produce flame~fireball~wall of fire~fire shield~fire seeds~elemental body IV|fire only~incendiary cloud~elemental swarm|fire spell only" save=domain}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/180;Goblins of Golarion/27;Inner Sea Gods/224›

::ab[Call Fire (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹fire bolt/#bolt›› power of the Fire domain" icon=line standard="You can stretch out your hand toward any visible fire source within 60 feet and beckon it toward you. This causes a ribbon-thin streak of fire to approach you in a straight line through the air. Any creature directly in the fire ribbon's path takes 1d4 points of fire damage; a successful Reflex save (DC = 10 + half your class level + your Wisdom modifier) negates this damage. When the ribbon of fire reaches your hand, it either extinguishes or lights a flammable object of your choice that you're holding." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="flaming sphere" l5="flame strike" l7="delayed blast fireball"}

::ab[Wall of Ashes (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹fire resistance/#res›› power of the Fire domain" l=8 icon=magic standard="You can create a wall of swirling ashes anywhere within 100 feet. This wall is up to 20 feet high and up to 10 feet long per cleric level you possess. The wall of ash blocks line of sight, and any creature passing through it must make a Fortitude save or be ‹misc/blinded› for 1d4 rounds. The wall of ash reveals invisible creatures that are inside it or adjacent to it, although they become invisible again if they move away from the wall." useL=cleric useUnit=minute useNC=1}

::ab[Cloud of Smoke (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹fire bolt/#bolt›› power of the Fire domain" icon=magic standard="As a standard action, you can create a 5-foot-radius cloud of smoke. This power has a range of 30 feet. Creatures inside the cloud take a -2 penalty on attack rolls and Perception skill checks for as long as they remain inside and for 1 round after exiting the cloud. Creatures inside the cloud gain ‹rule/concealment› from attacks made by opponents that are not adjacent to them." useMod3=Wis}

glory.name: Glory
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You are infused with the glory of the divine, and are a true foe of the undead.
::ab[Channel Boost (Su)]{id=boost icon=boost passive="When you ‹ability/channel positive energy› to harm undead creatures, the save DC to halve the damage is increased by 2."}

::ab[Touch of Glory (Sp)]{id=touch icon=boost standard="You can cause your hand to shimmer with divine radiance, allowing you to touch a creature and give it a bonus equal to your cleric level on a single Charisma-based skill check or Charisma ability check. This ability lasts for 1 hour or until the creature touched elects to apply the bonus to a roll." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Divine Presence (Su)]{id=div icon=protect standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of divine presence. All allies within this aura are treated as if under the effects of a ‹spell/sanctuary› spell with a DC equal to 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier. Activating this ability is a standard action. If an ally leaves the area or makes an attack, the effect ends for that ally. If you make an attack, the effect ends for you and your allies." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="shield of faith~bless weapon~searing light~holy smite~righteous might~undeath to death~holy sword~holy aura~gate" save=domain}

::ab[Bolstering Touch (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of glory/#touch›› power of the Glory domain" icon=protect standard="You can touch a willing creature, bracing it against frightening situations and allowing it to remain calm. The first fear effect that would affect the subject within the next hour is suppressed for the first 1d4 rounds of its effect. If you touch a creature currently suffering from an ongoing fear effect, this ability instead suppresses the ongoing fear effect for 1 round. The rounds during which the subject ignores the triggering fear effect still count against the effect's duration. If the fear effect is suppressed for longer than it lasts, the subject isn't affected by the fear effect at all." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="remove fear" l3=heroism l6="greater heroism"}

::ab[Aura of Heroism (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹divine presence/#div›› power of the Glory domain" l=8 icon=boost swift="You can emit a 30-foot aura of heroism. Allies in the area are treated as if they were under the effects of ‹spell/heroism›." useL=cleric useNC}

::ab[Honor Bound (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of glory/#touch›› power of the Glory domain" icon=aid standard="With a touch, you can remind a creature of its duties and responsibilities, granting it a new saving throw against each enchantment (charm) or enchantment (compulsion) effect that currently affects it. If the saving throw is successful, the enchantment effect is ended. This power only affects effects that allow a save. If you fail a save against such an effect, you can use this ability as an @HLimmediate_action to grant yourself an additional save. Once the target (either you or a touched creature) has made one additional save per effect, this ability has no further effect on that particular enchantment effect." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="zone of truth" l6="geas/quest"}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}
::ab[Class Skill]{icon=skill replace="The ‹‹channel boost/#boost›› ability of the Glory domain" passive="You gain ‹skill/Intimidate› (CHA) as a class skill."}

::ab[Divine Demand (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹divine presence/#div›› ability of the Glory domain" l=6 icon=boost swift="You can petition your divine patron for far greater power than you deserve. This ability can be used only as you cast a spell that has a reduced (but not negated) effect on a successful save. The saving throw DC of the spell increases by 2, and you gain a +2 bonus on caster level checks to overcome spell resistance with the spell. Any creature that succeeds at the saving throw instead avoids the effect entirely. If half or more of the targets are unaffected, you become ‹misc/shaken› for a number of rounds equal to the spell's level. If all of the targets are unaffected, you instead lose the ability to cast divine spells, channel energy, and use domain powers for 1d4+1 rounds; you can end this loss by loudly apologizing to your patron deity as a @HLfull-round_action that provokes attacks of opportunity." useInc="4~cleric~6"}

::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="hollow heroism" l7="greater hollow heroism" l9="overwhelming presence" extra="If you are evil, replace the domain spells *bless weapon* and *holy aura* with ‹spell/aid› and ‹spell/unholy aura› respectively."}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Bonus Feat]{replace="The ‹‹channel boost/#boost›› ability of the Glory domain" icon=power passive="In campaigns that use the optional ‹rule/hero point<s› system, you gain ‹feat/Hero's Fortune› as a bonus feat. Otherwise, you gain ‹feat/Marked for Glory› as a bonus feat, even if you do not meet its prerequisites."}

::ab[Witness the Legend (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹divine presence/#div›› ability of the Glory domain" l=8 icon=magic move="You can extol the virtues of yourself or an ally within 60 feet that you can see. This causes the target to shed light like a ‹eq-misc/torch› for 1 minute, and while the effect lasts, you can expend a daily use of your *touch of glory* domain ability as an immediate action to add 1d6 to an attack, saving throw, skill check, or ability check attempted by the target; for a roll to confirm a critical hit or save against a fear effect, you instead add 1d12." useInc="4~cleric~8"}

::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=aid l3="contagious zeal" l4="righteous vigor" l6="unshakeable zeal" extra="If you are evil, replace the domain spells *holy smite, holy sword,* and *holy aura* with ‹spell/unholy blight›, ‹spell/unholy sword›, and ‹spell/unholy aura› respectively."}

Allies in this aura receive a +2 deflection bonus to AC and a +2 resistance bonus on all saving throws. ::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="expeditious retreat" l3=fly l6="planar ally|azata only"}

::ab[Powerful Bond (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of good/#touch›› power of the Good domain" icon=magic free="You can open a link to communicate telepathically with a single ally within 60 feet. ::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="shield other" l5="telepathic bond"}

::ab[Aura of Sanctification (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹holy lance/#lance›› ability of the Good domain" l=8 icon=aura immediate="You can emit a 30-foot-radius aura of sanctification. healing.name: Healing
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] Your touch staves off pain and death, and your healing magic is particularly vital and potent.

::ab[Rebuke Death (Sp)]{id=rebuke icon=aid standard="You can touch a living creature, healing it for 1d4 points of damage plus 1 for every two cleric levels you possess. You can only use this ability on a creature that is below 0 hit points." useMod3=Wis}

::ab[Healer's Blessing (Su)]{id=bless l=6 icon=power passive="At 6th level, all of your ‹main/cure spells› are treated as if they were empowered, increasing the amount of damage healed by half (+50%). This does not apply to damage dealt to undead with a cure spell. This does not stack with the ‹feat/Empower Spell› metamagic feat."}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="cure light wounds~cure moderate wounds~cure serious wounds~cure critical wounds~breath of life~heal~regenerate~mass cure critical wounds~mass heal" save=domain}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Blessed Surgery (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹rebuke death/#rebuke›› power of the Healing domain" icon=aid-roll free="Your divine patron guides your healing hands, allowing you to perform minor miracles with mundane cures. You can use this ability when using the Heal skill in order to roll the check twice and take the higher result. When you're using this ability, any use of the Heal skill requiring 1 hour instead takes at most 1 minute." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="diagnose disease" l2="placebo effect"}

::ab[Restorative Touch (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹rebuke death/#rebuke›› power of the Healing domain" icon=aid standard="You can touch a creature, letting the healing power of your deity flow through you to relieve the creature of a minor condition. Your touch can remove the ‹misc/dazed›, ‹misc/fatigued›, ‹misc/shaken›, ‹misc/sickened›, or ‹misc/staggered› condition. You choose which condition is removed." useMod3=Wis}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="remove disease" l4="neutralize poison" l5="break enchantment"}

::ab[Gift of Life (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹healer's blessing/#bless›› power of the Healing domain" l=8 icon=aid standard="You can touch a creature that has died within the past minute to grant it a few moments of life. The dead creature returns to life for a number of rounds equal to your cleric level. Creatures returned to life in this way have a number of hit points equal to half your cleric level, and continue to be affected by any still-active spells, conditions, or afflictions present at the time of their death. At the end of this time, the creature dies again. The creature is free to act as it sees fit during this time. You are granted no control over it." useInc="4~cleric~8"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l5="raise dead" l7=resurrection l9="true resurrection"}

A cleric (or any other character capable of selecting a domain) who worships the deity in question can choose to gain the variant domain power upon first gaining the domain in question, but the choice to replace the domain power must be made immediately upon gaining access to that domain and cannot be changed thereafter.

Through ‹faith/Irori«'s› teachings, impurities in oneself and in the world are overcome. Irori's followers are some of the most self-disciplined of Golarion's faithful, believing that knowledge is the best weapon one can wield against the shackles of possession. They rarely directly involve themselves in battling those intruding forces, instead hoping the afflicted can overcome their situations through their own force of will. Haunts are the one exception to this mantra of non-intervention. As spirits beyond the mortal cycle, haunts are often targeted by the servants of Irori as being stains on the delicate fabric of the world.

::ab[Exorcise Haunt (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹rebuke death/#rebuke›› domain power of the Healing domain" icon=zap standard="You can emit a ‹misc/burst› of positive energy. Any haunt within 15 feet of you takes 1d8 points of damage plus 1 for every 2 cleric levels you have." useMod3=Wis}

knowledge.name: Knowledge
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You are a scholar and a sage of legends.

::ab[Lore Keeper (Sp)]{id=lore icon=touch ability="You can touch a creature to learn about its abilities and weaknesses. With a successful touch attack, you gain information as if you made the appropriate Knowledge skill check with a result equal to 15 + your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier."}

::ab[Remote Viewing (Sp)]{id=rem l=6 icon=magic standard="You can use ‹spell/clairvoyance/clairaudience› at will as a spell-like ability using your cleric level as the caster level." useL=cleric useNC}

While in this form, you are immune to critical hits and gain a deflection bonus to AC equal to ‹misc/one-fourth› of your cleric level." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=sanctuary l5="telepathic bond" l6="planar binding|aeons only"}

::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="know the enemy" l2="fox's cunning" l6="battlemind link" l8="circle of clarity"}

When targeted by a spell or effect that would compromise your chosen disguise (such as ‹spell/detect evil›, ‹spell/detect thoughts›, or ‹spell/zone of truth›), as an immediate action you can force the creature using the ability to attempt a Will save (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier). If the creature fails, it gains false information in keeping with your cover identity. You can use this false information ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier."}
